Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Executor
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Continued To Aug-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-13-2020 is admitted to probate. James Chan is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-28-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Advanced From Jul-06-22 To Jun-23-22 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Release Of Telephone Records Of James Chan And Scott Chan
Off Calendar Jun-17-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses And To Compel Privilege Log; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-17-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Aug-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Kloenhamer, via Zoom, for James Chan, Petitioner; Mark Bluer, via Zoom, for Dong Chen, Objector.

The court confirms with counsel that this matter has settled. The court asks if the will can be admitted to probate and consequently take the other matters off calendar. Mr. Kloenhamer reports that the settlement is conditional. Mr. Bluer confirms the preceding and advises that some of the settlement conditions will take some time to finalize. The court confirms that the parties have not discussed whether they intend to file a petition to approve the settlement. The court confirms with counsel that they wish to continue the matters that are on calendar to allow the settlement agreement to be finalized.

After additional discussion, the matters are continued to Aug-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jun-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Continued To May-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Continued To May-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Bluer, via zoom, for Dong Chen, Petitioner/Objector; Matthew Kloenhamer, via zoom, for James Chan, Petitioner/Objector.

The court notes that there are two motions pending in this matter which have been separately set, one for Jun-23-2022 and the other for Jul-06-2022. On the court's own motion, Dong Chen's Motion to Compel Further Responses, etc., is advanced to Jun-23-2022 at 2:00 pm in Dept. 204 to be heard alongside Dong Chen's Motion for Release of Telephone Records. The court and counsel discuss the contentiousness of this matter and discuss whether they have met and conferred. Messrs. Bluer and Kloenhamer offer oral testimony regarding their individual positions. The court points to the pro bono mediation program and counsel agrees to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May-09-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the status of mediation by May-16-2022. The matters are continued to May-23-2022. The Parties are to return on May-23-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Counsel is instructed to monitor the court's Register of Actions to obtain a copy of the Minute Order Referring Case to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Teebay. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Mar-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Mar-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Kloenhamer and Morgan Cahil-Marsland appeared by zoom for James Chan.
Mark Bluer appeared by zoom for Dong Chen.

The court questions whether there is a need to appoint a special administrator. Discussion was held and both sides indicated that they don't feel it is necessary at this time. The Petition for Letters of Administration, and the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are continued to March 28, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow the will contest to be addressed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

Notice Of James Chan?S Motion To Quash Subpoenas Served By Dong Chen

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Bluer appeared by zoom for Dong Chen (petitioner).
Morgan Cahill-Marsland and Matthew Kloenhammer appeared by zoom for James Chan (objector).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. James Chan's Motion to Quash Subpoenas Served by Dong Chen is denied (see tentative ruling for details).

Judge: Ross C. Moody (by zoom). Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: H. Singh. Reporter: Kylie Shepherd, CSR #13756, 714-873-7217, kylie.shepherd.csr@gmail.com
